name: Chicken Enchiladas- Clinton
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (4 ounce each) chopped green chilies
1 can (28 ounce) tomatoes, drained and liquid reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium-high heat, heat 1 tablespoon oil. Add the chilies and garlic; sauté until garlic is soft.
2. Break up tomatoes and add to chilies along with onions, salt, oregano, and reserved tomato liquid. Simmer uncovered until thick, about 30 minutes. Adjust seasoning with more tomato liquid if needed.
3. Remove sauce from heat and set aside.
4. Heat 1/3 cup oil in a skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Dip tortillas in hot oil for a few seconds or just until they become limp, then drain well on paper towels.
5. Fill tortillas with chicken mixture. Roll up seam side down and arrange side by side in a 9x13x2-inch baking dish.
6. Pour tomato sauce over enchiladas and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 20 minutes.
7. Serve hot.
